terminologyProfile.descriptionRule: Dimensions are metres in the declared right-handed asset frame; botanical form is authored intent rather than species or image evidence.

objectClass.notes: Authored benchmark brief with no external image reference.

reasoning: One tapered trunk, six authored branch pivots, and repeated foliage create a deep deterministic hierarchy.
The minimum tier changes foliage representation while preserving semantics and rooted motion.

specDepthDecision.rationale: Organic attachment continuity and mobile representation changes require explicit hierarchy and invariants.

definitionOfDone: Pot, soil, root flare, tapered trunk, asymmetrical branches, and foliage pads read as one rooted miniature tree.
The action-ready authored sway preview preserves the root anchor and resets every authored rotation exactly without claiming environmental wind physics.
All tiers preserve protected runtime and physics-authoring identities.

featureGroups.name: Pot, soil, and root flare
qualityCriteria: Oval ceramic support, exposed soil, and embedded radial roots form a stable base.

featureGroups.name: Oriented trunk and six-branch hierarchy
qualityCriteria: Tapered rotation-minimizing rings preserve branch attachment and asymmetry.

featureGroups.name: Opaque foliage tier system
qualityCriteria: Full and budgeted use merged leaf solids; minimum uses six opaque clusters and zero alpha-sorted fragments.

featureGroups.name: Rooted authored sway preview
qualityCriteria: Deterministic diagnostic sway rotates rigid branch-root pivots, leaves the root anchor fixed, preserves shadow parity, and resets exactly without claiming continuous deformation or consuming environmental forcing.

featureGroups.name: Ceramic, soil, bark, and foliage zones
qualityCriteria: Material families remain physically distinct under neutral and grazing light.

antiShallowSpecRules: Reject alpha-card foliage or one full-tier canopy sphere.
Reject diagnostic sway that moves the root anchor or is presented as a production wind solver.
Reject species, solver, or visual-acceptance claims without evidence.

actionReadiness.contract: Stable branch-root pivots, parent-local sockets, destruction groups, and ColliderConstructionInput records remain identical across visual tiers.
authoringRules: Place branch pivots at attachment roots.
Share Object3D transforms between color and shadow rendering.
Do not adapt construction inputs inside the asset factory.

destructionPolicy.debrisStrategy: Detach authored branches before any solver-owned fragments.

materialPass.acceptedLimitation: No source image or species-accuracy evidence exists.

visualAcceptance.scoringRule: AI vision reviews authored visual contracts; no reference-image similarity claim is possible.

featureReviewPolicy.selectionRule: Review object-specific authored systems from named cameras.

screenshotPolicy.minimumEvidence: Named PNG, renderer/backend record, camera, mode, tier, seed, AI-vision scores, and notes.
screenshotPolicy.reviewPairRule: No reference pair exists; compare named views to authored feature contracts.
screenshotPolicy.acceptanceAuthority: AI-vision review record plus technical evidence.

sculptPipeline.blockedReason: Awaiting first native-WebGPU authored-contract capture and AI-vision review.

coordinateFrame.root: pot-foot center on the support plane
coordinateFrame.scaleReference: Maximum authored envelope is 2.16 x 2.32 x 1.55 metres

silhouette.boundingShape: 2.16 x 2.32 x 1.55 metre rooted botanical envelope
silhouette.symmetry: Pot is approximately bilateral; trunk and crown are deliberately asymmetric.

observations: Oval pot, soil, and four radial roots define the authored support system.
One trunk, three primary branches, and three secondary branches use named root and tip sockets.
Full/budgeted merged leaf solids and minimum opaque clusters preserve six foliage identities with no alpha-sorted fragments.
Deterministic authored sway leaves the root anchor fixed and resets exact authored rotations without claiming production wind.
Glazed ceramic, unglazed foot, soil, bark, and foliage are distinct zones.

materials.name: Blue-green glazed pot
localOverrides: darker lower wall and rim pooling

materials.name: Tapered trunk bark
localOverrides: lighter root flare and darker inner forks

materials.name: Opaque green foliage
localOverrides: darker inner pad and lighter top leaves

repetitionSystems.distribution: Four oriented-ring roots overlap the soil from the root-flare pivot.
Three primary and three secondary branches with root/tip sockets.
One foliage identity per branch; geometry representation changes by tier without alpha cards.

buildPasses.goal: Prove pot/tree proportion and crown silhouette.
Prove branch hierarchy, sockets, and root attachments.
Refine oriented rings, taper, and crown-pad rhythm.
acceptance: Profile and attachment captures show no frame twist.

buildPasses.goal: Separate ceramic, soil, bark, and foliage.
acceptance: Close-material capture preserves all material families.

buildPasses.goal: Add scale-aware glaze, soil, bark, and leaf response.
acceptance: Grazing light reveals bounded response without texture swimming.
Key, fill, rim, ACES exposure, and contact shadow are recorded.

buildPasses.goal: Prove rooted authored sway and exact reset without a production-wind claim.
acceptance: Fixed-time captures differ, root anchor remains fixed, and reset is exact.

buildPasses.goal: Prove tier monotonicity and opaque minimum canopy.
acceptance: Geometry decreases by tier, minimum uses six opaque clusters, and protected IDs are exact.

lodPlan.strategy: High-section closed oriented rings and 84 merged closed opaque leaf solids; seed 0x5eed source metrics are 21 render items, 2,229 stored vertices, and 2,952 triangles.
Reduced closed ring sampling and 48 merged closed opaque leaf solids; seed 0x5eed source metrics are 21 render items, 1,377 stored vertices, and 1,688 triangles.

Minimum closed ring sampling and six closed pole-ring opaque canopy clusters with zero alpha-sorted fragments; seed 0x5eed source metrics are 21 render items, 858 stored vertices, and 1,042 triangles.

performanceBudget.optimizationPolicy: No sustained-performance claim passes without named-device CPU/GPU/presentation evidence. Preserve one scene render, opaque minimum foliage, and no post-processing passes.

lightingFromPhoto: No source photo exists; use neutral key, soft fill, and restrained rim light for authored form inspection.
Use explicit ACES tone mapping, recorded exposure, and one output transform.
Use a receiving plane for contact shadow; do not add a post-processing pipeline.
proceduralStrategy: Build pot forms from lathe/cylinder primitives and roots/trunk/branches from rotation-minimizing oriented rings.
Root every branch at a named parent-local socket and keep six foliage identities stable.
Use merged opaque leaf solids at full/budgeted and six opaque canopy clusters at minimum.
Drive deterministic rooted diagnostic sway through shared Object3D transforms and exact reset; consume no environmental forcing.
Publish ColliderConstructionInput records only; the solver handoff remains blocked.
Render native WebGPU NodeMaterials in one scene render with no post-processing passes.
risks: No external reference image exists, so reconstruction fidelity and species accuracy cannot be evaluated.
Crown readability and material acceptance require future native-WebGPU browser inspection.
ColliderConstructionInput records are not canonical collision proxies or solver authority.
